description: Composition Black bermuda shorts made of 100% polyester, with a broad, elasticated waistband, drawstrings woven through loops, two insert pockets, printed branding on the left leg below the left pocket and a pocket at the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry Use warm iron; do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, this pair of bermudas from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from polyester, these shorts are ideal for family picnics or laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the smart branding does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a T-shirt and sneakers or flip flops. Model statistics The product is of size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
